notes: Flipull is a pure puzzle game with no documented narrative, faction systems, political situations, or world-state communications. The available source (TCRF) contains only metadata and hidden feature documentation, with no gameplay mechanics, visual design, or thematic details. Manifestation layer analysis cannot be completed without access to actual gameplay footage, sprite documentation, or design documentation describing the cube-flipping mechanics and visual feedback systems.
